items.title: Some of the nation’s rich are letting AI teach their kids

This weekly roundup pulls together all of the Steals from the past week, and puts them in a digestable list for you to consume every Saturday morning. A couple of headliners include this retractable USB-C 6-in-1 outlet extender at $14 as well as five solo loop-style Apple Watch bands at $3 each. Head below to see all of your options.

items.title: Best 4th of July EV deals from Lectric, Segway, Aventon, Velotric, Tenways, Heybike, Hiboy, and more
items.summary: Happy 4th of July to all our readers, and a very big happy 250th birthday to America! With the official holiday right on our doorsteps, bringing along plenty of celebrations of the country’s independence, we wanted to shine a spotlight on all the current holiday sales on EVs that give you the freedom to roam and independence from gas-guzzling vehicles. Below, you can find all the very best ongoing deals and larger sales on e-bikes, e-scooters, electric dirt bikes, and more, but don’t dawdle for too long on decisions, as these savings are set to disappear after this weekend. So kick the tires, light the BBQ fires, and find your own eco-friendly independence this summer!
